title: Engineering Mathematics_ Linear Algebra - Eigen Value - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
Which one of the following statements is NOT true for a square matrix A?

My question is what is “principal minors of A” ? 



GATE-2014 EC
options: If A is real symmetric, the eigen values of A are the diagonal elements of it.
If all the principal minors of A are positive, all the eigen values of A are also positive.
